introSection: Die Schlange von Midgard is a steel roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Die Schlange von Midgard is German for "Midgard Serpent". Midgard is one of the nine worlds of Norse mythology.

fullText:
Die Schlange von Midgard is a steel roller coaster located at Hansa-Park in Sierksdorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.





Die Schlange von Midgard is German for "Midgard Serpent". Midgard is one of the nine worlds of Norse mythology.
